session_changes.summary: Design token migration + service expansion. 28 service pages (up from 12). Complete visual reskin: 3-tier dark surfaces, orange accent palette, Inter/Plus Jakarta Sans fonts, gradient-text replacing Playfair italic, 20px pill radius, floating navbar, atmospheric effects. Bento grid service cards. Comparison heading contrast.
changes: Homepage ServicesOverview: 6 category cards updated — Paid Media, Growth Engine, Creative Studio, AI & Build, Industry Verticals, Full Funnel Marketing
ServicePageClient.tsx rewritten from 9 sections to V2 blueprint with inline lead capture forms, expanded FAQs, testimonial carousel, and WhatsApp floating CTA
Hero section: split 50/50 layout with H1 + positive value-prop bullets (from benefits) on left, white lead capture form card on right
Hero value props flipped from pain points to positive benefit outcomes (checkmarks paired with positive messaging)
Sound Familiar? pain points section removed entirely (pain established in hero subtitle)
Comparison heading changed from 'But, why would you want to work with us?' to 'What sets Aurelius Media apart?'
FAQs expanded to 8-10 per service via getCommonFAQs() appending 6 universal questions. First 3 expanded by default
FAQPage + Service + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data added to all service pages (auto-generated in page.tsx)
Final CTA upgraded: inline 3-field form (Name, Email, Phone) + dual buttons + trust copy
Testimonials expanded from single quote to 3-card carousel per service with dedicated testimonial pool
Why Aurelius Media differentiators section removed, unique points merged into comparison rows
AI/automation comparison row auto-appended to every service page
Context labels added under proof stats (metric + timeframe description)
WhatsApp floating CTA added: green button (#25D366), appears after 30% scroll, hides at final CTA, dynamic pre-filled message
H3 keyword optimization for benefits + sub-services in no-code-development, ai-workshops, and real-estate-marketing
Related articles filtered by category per service page via serviceBlogCategoryMap
Project uploaded to GitHub: github.com/ayushpant-rgb/aurelius-media

Expanded from 12 to 28 service pages — 16 new services added (linkedin-ads, youtube-ads, tiktok-ads, retargeting, lead-generation, funnel-building, cro, programmatic-seo, analytics-reporting, email-lifecycle, brand-videos, ugc-ads, landing-pages, content-strategy, pitch-decks, ai-agents)
Bento grid layout (bento-grid.tsx) for service cards on homepage and /services hub
Lucide icon support added to ServicePersona interface and persona cards

Complete design token migration: 3-tier dark surfaces, new orange accent palette, Inter body + Plus Jakarta Sans headings, gradient-text class, 20px pill radius, floating pill navbar, updated CTA buttons, atmospheric effects
Comparison heading contrast: 'Aurelius Media' rendered in gradient-text on all service pages
TestimonialsCarousel rewritten: 3 vertical columns with alternating scroll (down/up/down at 40s/45s/42s), fixed-height container with top/bottom fades
Homepage section reorder: Testimonials moved after ServicesOverview, CapabilitiesPanel moved below
FeaturedResults case studies contained within max-w-7xl, CSS animation, enlarged cards (400x460px), swapped Health Tech / University images
Service page budget options changed from INR (₹1L–₹20L+) to USD ($1,000–$20,000+)
Hero sub-headline: max-w-md → max-w-lg + px-2 to prevent text clipping on mobile

blog_typography.h2: text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl, font-bold, mt-14 mb-5, tracking-tight

blog_images.aspect_ratio: 4:3 (aspect-[4/3]) everywhere — homepage preview, blog hub cards, blog post hero
blog_images.format: All future blog images should be 4:3

faq_component.style: Divider-based (border-top/bottom lines, not boxed cards), large question text (text-lg sm:text-xl), circled plus/minus icon, smooth grid-row expand animation

service_page_blueprint.section_order: Hero+LeadForm → Social Proof Bar → What Is [Service] → Who Is This For → How We Do It → Benefits → Sub-Services Grid → What Sets Aurelius Media Apart (Comparison) → Results Stats → Testimonials (3-card carousel) → FAQ (8-10 questions) → Related Services → Related Articles → Final CTA (form + dual buttons) + WhatsApp floating CTA
service_page_blueprint.removed_sections: Sound Familiar? (pain points) removed in V2 — pain established in hero subtitle. Why Aurelius Media (differentiators) merged into comparison rows.
service_page_blueprint.hero_design: Split 50/50: left = H1 + description + 3 positive value-prop bullets (from benefits[0:3]) + secondary CTAs, right = white lead capture form card (Name, Email, Phone, Industry, Budget)
service_page_blueprint.comparison_design: Two-column card layout: left card (Other Agencies, X icons, muted text), right card (Aurelius Media with pulsing red dot + logo, checkmarks, white bold text, warm radial gradient glow). Heading: 'What sets Aurelius Media apart?'. AI/automation row auto-appended.
service_page_blueprint.social_proof_bar: Client logo carousel matching homepage Hero implementation (full-color logos, h-16 sm:h-20 md:h-24, animate-logo-scroll)
service_page_blueprint.structured_data: FAQPage + Service + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD auto-generated per page in page.tsx via schema.ts generators
service_page_blueprint.whatsapp_cta: Fixed bottom-right green button (#25D366, 56px), appears after 30% scroll, hides when final CTA in viewport, pre-filled message with service name

pages.title: Aurelius Media | AI-Powered Performance Marketing Agency
pages.h1: AI-Powered Marketing. Real Results.
pages.meta_description: AI-powered performance marketing agency with 20+ years of experience. Google & Meta Ads, AI Creative, Video Production, Book Marketing and more. 100CR+ in ad spend managed across 25+ countries.
pages.notes: Home. Shader hero graphic. Section order: Hero → MissionStatement (BlurReveal) → FeaturedResults → ServicesOverview → TestimonialsCarousel (3 vertical columns, down/up/down) → CapabilitiesPanel → BlogPreview → CTABlock. ServicesOverview 6 category cards: Paid Media, Growth Engine, Creative Studio, AI & Build, Industry Verticals, Full Funnel Marketing.

programmatic_templates.notes: V2 blueprint: Hero+LeadForm (positive value props from benefits), Social Proof Bar, What Is [Service], Who Is This For, How We Do It, Benefits, Sub-Services Grid, What Sets Aurelius Media Apart (comparison with AI row auto-appended), Results Stats (with context labels), Testimonials (3-card carousel), FAQ (8-10 questions, FAQAccordion + FAQPage JSON-LD), Related Services, Related Articles (category-filtered), Final CTA (inline form + dual buttons), WhatsApp floating CTA. Sound Familiar and Why Aurelius Media sections removed in V2. Service + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD also injected. H3 titles keyword-optimized across all services.
Blog post template updated: 17-18px body text, 1.85 line-height, 720px content column, 4:3 hero image aspect ratio. Blog FAQs use <details>/<summary> HTML styled via globals.css.

reusable_components.name: FAQAccordion
reusable_components.description: Divider-based FAQ accordion with plus/minus icon animation. Accepts items array of {question, answer}, optional heading/eyebrow props.
